sections.heading: Projects
items: Unsaved timelines, media, chats, and generation state now recover together.
Save, Save As, media import, and song replacement now preserve one complete project state.

sections.heading: Agent
items: App controls no longer appear as messages you typed.
Tool failures and approval refusals now stay actionable without exposing internal instructions.

sections.heading: Generation
items: The project budget stop now guards every paid generation path before provider dispatch.
Provider pricing, reservations, and verified charges now share one project ledger.

sections.heading: Format packs
items: Downloaded packs are signed, notarized, integrity-checked, and load-tested under quarantine.
Release previews use isolated plugin channels; stable publication happens only after the app release succeeds.

sections.heading: Agent
items: Attach project media directly from the composer.
Workflow starters no longer appear as messages you typed.
Existing chat sessions remain compatible with the updated transcript format.

sections.heading: Format packs
items: The active format now has a visible workspace identity and accent.
Music Video uses clearer starter copy and human-readable phase names.

sections.heading: New
items: New export_project tool - Agent can now export videos for you.
New remove_words tool - Agent can now read your timeline, and remove filler words.

sections.heading: UI
items: Change project settings in the inspector panel - edit fps, resolution, and aspect ratio.
